# Module Context Template

## Core Purpose
One short paragraph describing what this module/feature is responsible for.

## Inputs
- HTTP routes or public functions
- DTOs/schemas consumed
- Auth/role constraints

## Outputs
- Response DTOs/data contracts
- Updated entities/states
- Downstream consumers

## Side Effects
- Queue jobs produced/consumed
- WebSocket events emitted/listened
- Notifications, external APIs, webhooks

## Dependencies
- Upstream callers
- Internal module dependencies
- External services (DB, Redis, payment provider, AI provider)

## Change Safety Notes
- High-risk touchpoints
- What to validate before merge
